nodes.name: Archive Collection
nodes.summary: A neutral parent collection for archive-style fixture questions.
scope_notes: Use this collection only to test non-topic scope units.

nodes.name: Archive Question
nodes.summary: A neutral question-shaped scope unit used to verify the workflow does not depend on topic labels.
scope_notes: Claims must stay bounded to archived fixture material.
This fixture is not about a real archive.

nodes.name: Archive Gap Question
nodes.summary: A second question-shaped scope unit that should remain uncovered in planning queues.
scope_notes: Use as an uncovered queue example for a non-topic scope unit.
